proof:
unfold p0ProjectionResidualSq2 constApproxError2
have h_sum_zero : (u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) + (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) = 0 := p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero u0 u1
have h_decomp : (u0 - c) ^ 2 + (u1 - c) ^ 2 = (u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) ^ 2 + (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) ^ 2 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 := by
  have h0 : u0 - c = (u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) + (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) := by ring
  have h1 : u1 - c = (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) + (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) := by ring
  rw [h0, h1]
  ring_nf
  rw [← mul_add (2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c))]
  rw [h_sum_zero]
  ring
rw [h_decomp]
linarith [sq_nonneg (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c)]

unfold weightedP0Average
rw [← mul_div_assoc]
congr 1
rw [Finset.mul_sum]
apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
intro i _
ring

unfold weightedP0Residual weightedP0Average
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp [hmass]
ring

unfold laxFriedrichsStep
have hW := laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg cfl hcflLower hcflUpper
calc
  |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| ≤
      |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := abs_add_le _ _
  _ = |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl| * |uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl| * |uRight| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
  _ = laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| := by rw [abs_of_nonneg hW.1, abs_of_nonneg hW.2]
  _ ≤ laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * M + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * M := by
      exact add_le_add (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft hW.1) (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight hW.2)
  _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := by ring
  _ = 1 * M := by rw [laxFriedrichsWeights_sum cfl]
  _ = M := by ring

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
exact hr0
constructor
linarith
exact hr0

unfold vec2InfNorm diag2First diag2Second
rw [max_le]
constructor
· calc
|a * x| = |a| * |x| := by rw [abs_mul]
_ <= rho * |x| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ha (abs_nonneg x)
_ <= rho * vec2InfNorm x y := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_left_le_vec2InfNorm x y) hrho
· calc
|b * y| = |b| * |y| := by rw [abs_mul]
_ <= rho * |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hb (abs_nonneg y)
_ <= rho * vec2InfNorm x y := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_right_le_vec2InfNorm x y) hrho

unfold finiteDC centeredSignal finiteMean
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
rw [Finset.sum_const]
rw [nsmul_eq_mul]
field_simp [hcard]
ring
